final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input set,
    input d,
    output reg q,    // Changed 'output q' to 'output reg q'
    output qn
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        q <= 0;
    end
    else if (set) begin
        q <= 1;
    end
    else begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

assign qn = ~q;

endmodule
